channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The U.S. has 1,200 AI bills and no good test for any of them
item.description: Yale's Jeffrey Sonnenfeld and Stephen Henriques and NYU's Gary Marcus offer a method for separating necessary AI regulation from legislative noise.

item.title: State Farm CEO is betting big on AI—and contemplating the company’s future in California
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Stocks in this sector of the S&P 500 are getting more attractive — here’s why
A common retirement error may still be correctable for many people.
